smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
